# moneymeta.fun

moneymeta.fun is the Vicious Syndicate of moneymaking: a live tier list that ranks every way to make money into S to D tiers by a meta score built from public data. Income paths ("decks") are scored on median income, growth, and barrier to entry, so you can see the best money deck to play in life right now, whether you are starting today with little capital (the "start now" lens) or climbing for the highest ceiling (the "highest ceiling" lens). Occupations are anchored on US BLS data; internet and creator paths show the brutal, survivorship-adjusted median and a data-confidence badge. Every number traces to a public source. It is a personal decision tool, not financial or career advice.

## Pricing
Founding lifetime license $29: https://buy.stripe.com/dRmbJ1eno9kNfYQfgZaMU0y

Site (the money meta, every way to make money ranked S to D): https://moneymeta.fun
